code: import{Inline}from"@atlaskit/primitives";import Lozenge from"@atlaskit/lozenge";import Tooltip from"@atlaskit/tooltip";import{xcss}from'@atlaskit/primitives';import{useEstimation}from"../../Pages/Estimation/EstimationContext";import{useEstimationTarget}from"../../Pages/Estimation/EstimationTargetContext";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const UpperTargetLabel=_ref=>{let{upperGoal}=_ref;const{pointsToDistribute}=useEstimation();const{getTotalDPPoints}=useEstimationTarget();let appearance="success";switch(true){case getTotalDPPoints(upperGoal.id)>pointsToDistribute:appearance="removed";break;case getTotalDPPoints(upperGoal.id)>1:appearance="success";break;case getTotalDPPoints(upperGoal.id)===0:appearance="inprogress";break;}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Inline,{alignInline:"end",alignBlock:"center",space:"space.100",xcss:xcss({overflow:'hidden'}),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{content:"Points distributed",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Lozenge,{appearance:appearance,isBold:true,children:getTotalDPPoints(upperGoal.id)})})});};
